assembly_context.name: 4Axis_Robotic_Arm_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 生成一个包含底座、3个中间臂段和1个带夹爪顶臂的4轴机械臂装配体。底座为长方体加圆台接口；臂段由两端方块（60x60x60mm）和中间圆柱组成，通过侧面销孔配合实现竖直转动；底座与第一臂通过中心轴孔配合实现水平转动。所有方块棱边倒角C2。交付SolidWorks零件及装配文件。
design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for modeling API.
Chamfer C2 on all cube edges of arm segments.
Clearance fit assumed for pin/hole interfaces (nominal size used for geometry).
Gripper fingers are modeled in half-open state.
assembly_sequence: Insert base_plate and fix to GROUND.
Mate arm_segment_2.bottom_side_face coincident with arm_segment_1.top_pin_face (or appropriate offset).

part.name: Base Plate
part.function: Stationary foundation providing vertical rotation axis for Arm 1.
part.shape: Rectangular block 200x200x100mm with a two-stage cylindrical boss on top. Bottom stage: Φ80x20mm. Top stage: Φ40x30mm.
part.material_or_notes: Steel or Aluminum. Fillet edges if desired, but not specified.

axes.name: main_axis_z
axes.direction_relation: along local Z, centered on block

standalone_modeling_instructions: Sketch rectangle 200x200 on XY plane, extrude 100mm along +Z.
On top face, sketch circle Dia 80, extrude 20mm.
On new top face, sketch circle Dia 40, extrude 30mm.
Ensure main_axis_z is defined as the central axis of the cylinders.
